articles.title: STABILITY AND WURSTCHEN RELEASE NEW TEXT TO IMAGE MODEL
articles.summary: The Stable Cascade model is a new research-only text-to-image model that outperforms SDXL in aesthetics, prompt faithfulness, and text quality. It was trained using the Würstchen architecture and has a multi-step architecture that makes tuning easy.

articles.title: OPENAI TESTING MEMORY IN CHATGPT
articles.summary: OpenAI is testing a new feature that allows ChatGPT to remember facts across conversations. This can be switched off if desired. It will allow for a higher measure of personalization when interacting with the chat system.

articles.title: LETTER FROM THE YOUTUBE CEO: 4 BIG BETS FOR 2024
articles.summary: YouTube is investing in diverse revenue streams for creators. The platform witnessed a 50% increase in the use of channel memberships. It is fostering creator support networks through initiatives like the Creator Collective. Efforts are underway to help policymakers understand and recognize the economic and entertainment value of creators.

articles.title: BOOSTING MATH SKILLS IN AI
articles.summary: Researchers have developed a new technique to enhance language models' ability in math by using base models to select high-quality mathematical content autonomously.

articles.title: A NOVEL IMAGE SEGMENTATION
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced a new technique for image segmentation that identifies specific parts of an image, like a dog, using only basic image labels. They tackled the challenge of a network recognizing multiple instances of the same object by introducing a novel method that refines the process and reduces errors.

articles.title: SAFEGUARDING PRIVACY WITH LARGE LANGUAGE MODELS
CUDA FOR AMD
articles.summary: ZLUDA is a port of CUDA for AMD chips. It is in alpha but has been shown to run many graphics software packages like Blender successfully.

articles.title: ENHANCING TRANSLATION ACCURACY
articles.summary: GenTranslate is a new approach that uses large language models to improve the quality of translations. It focuses on the best possible translations generated by foundational models. The method has proven to outperform current leading translation models in tests.

articles.title: DESIGN2CODE
articles.summary: Design2Code is an open-source project that converts various web design formats, including sketches, wireframes, Figma, and XD, into clean and responsive HTML/CSS/JS code.

articles.title: AN INTERVIEW WITH META’S AI CHIEF YANN LECUN
articles.summary: Yann LeCun discusses AGI, open-source, and AI risk with Time Magazine.

articles.title: SAM ALTMAN SEEKING TRILLIONS FOR AI CHIP FABRICATION FROM UAE, OTHERS
articles.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is in talks with investors to raise up to $7 trillion for AI chip manufacturing. The project aims to address GPU scarcity as the chips are crucial for training and running large language models. Potential investors include sovereign wealth funds and government entities, which may raise geopolitical concerns. The US has been cautious about allowing foreign control over the supply of microchips - it recently announced a $5 billion investment in R&D to advance US-made semiconductor technologies.

articles.title: META TO DEPLOY IN-HOUSE CUSTOM CHIPS THIS YEAR TO POWER AI DRIVE
articles.summary: Meta is planning to deploy a new version of its custom AI chip in data centers this year, aiming to reduce reliance on Nvidia chips and control costs for running AI workloads.

articles.title: LAST CHANCE TO JOIN THE BIGGEST AI VIRTUAL CONFERENCE OF THE YEAR
articles.summary: The AI in Production conference is happening tomorrow and next Thursday! Join an all-star roster of speakers, or come for the games

articles.title: and networking. Save your spot in 10 seconds
GOOGLE'S €25M AI SKILLS TRAINING INITIATIVE IN EUROPE
articles.summary: Google launched a skills training plan for Europe. It offers free courses and startup opportunity credits.

articles.title: SGLANG
articles.summary: A structured generation language designed for LLMs.

articles.title: GALILEO AI (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Generate interface designs at lightning speeds.
